chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 64 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on withdrawal statement dt.19.01.2023. 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 286/23 4.For orders on CMA 287/23 5.For hearing of main case 26-04-2023 ***** Mr. Farhan Ali Shaikh, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Qurban Ali Shar, counsel for the petitioner and under instructions does not press the instant petition, which stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
